description: Developed the frontend of a school management website for SDN 5 Joglo using Next.js (https://sdnjoglo05.sch.id/).
Built the frontend of SIERA, an integrated platform for information management, participant tracking, and certification for PATRIBERA using React (https://siera.veterantech.id/).
Collaborated in developing the backend side of Dignition as an internal LMS web platform for KSM Veterantech using Hono.js.
Improved JMO backend microservices using Go and Kafka, including email service migration and system refactoring.
Implemented security and reliability features such as geofencing, device tracking, and notification token management.
Developed Automated Testing Equipment (ATE) applications for HIPOT testing automation using C# and .NET, including TestToolConfig.exe and HIPOT Test.exe.
Implemented system configuration, testing workflows, and interface refinements to improve operational usability and production testing efficiency.
Collaborated in designing social media (e.g. Instagram) content using Figma.
Collaborated in making UI Designs using Figma for a design system website of Android UPNVJ.
